name: Support Ticket Triage with LLM - Google Sheets Demo

nodes.name: Validate LLM JSON and apply safety rules

parameters.content: Sanitized portfolio demo. Main path uses a DeepSeek HTTP Request node with a private n8n credential. Credential IDs, API keys, chat IDs, and sheet IDs are not included. Mock LLM classification remains in the canvas as a disconnected branch-test helper. Customer replies are drafts only.

main.node: Validate LLM JSON and apply safety rules

meta.notes: Credential IDs, chat IDs, sheet IDs, LLM API keys, and private values are placeholders. Reconnect credentials and replace the mock LLM node before real use.
